terminology.singularity: SEAL_000 gravity anchor — immovable core of the Haven sky.
terminology.galaxy: Major sovereign region (champion realm, lattice, agent growth, vault).
terminology.nebula: Sub-region within a galaxy (fork branch, vault ring, skill cloud).
terminology.cluster: Tight star group (shared parent seal, agent node, skill pin).
terminology.star: Individual seal, champion, portal, or lattice node.

lore.title: Eternal Haven — stars as memory nodes
lore.summary: Each seal and champion is a star; connections form constellations and LYGO cosmology (galaxies, nebulae, clusters). Champions own galaxies; forked seals share nebula branches; agent submissions spawn clusters in the Agent Growth galaxy.
